name: td-starter-pack-mcp
description: AI assistant for TouchDesigner - control nodes, execute Python scripts, search local catalogues, and create interactive visual content
long_description:
# TD Starter Pack MCP Server

Bridge between AI assistants and TouchDesigner for creative coding and visual programming. Features include:

- **Node Operations**: Create, delete, and modify TouchDesigner nodes
- **Python Execution**: Run Python scripts in TouchDesigner with read-only, safe-write, and full-exec modes
- **Parameter Control**: Update node parameters and connections
- **Real-time Monitoring**: Get TouchDesigner server information and node details
- **Local Catalogues**: Search generated operator metadata, GLSL patterns, lessons, templates, and reusable assets
- **Code Execution Manifest**: Generate filesystem-style tool manifests (`describe_td_tools`) for code-mode agents

The package does not redistribute Derivative operator documentation; operator descriptions are generated from the user's local TouchDesigner installation when requested.

tools.name: describe_td_tools
tools.description: Generate filesystem manifests of TouchDesigner tools with detailLevel/responseFormat/filter options for code execution environments

tools.name: create_td_node
tools.description: Create new nodes in TouchDesigner with specified family and parameters

tools.name: delete_td_node
tools.description: Delete existing nodes from TouchDesigner by path

tools.name: execute_python_script
tools.description: Execute Python scripts directly in TouchDesigner environment with full API access

tools.name: exec_node_method
tools.description: Execute methods on TouchDesigner nodes (cook, pulse, reset, etc.)

tools.name: get_td_info
tools.description: Get TouchDesigner server information and connection status

tools.name: get_module_help
tools.description: Get Python help() documentation for TouchDesigner modules and classes

tools.name: get_td_class_details
tools.description: Get detailed documentation for TouchDesigner Python classes

tools.name: get_td_classes
tools.description: List available TouchDesigner Python classes and modules

tools.name: get_td_node_errors
tools.description: Check for errors on a specified node and its children

tools.name: get_td_node_parameters
tools.description: Retrieve parameters and current values for TouchDesigner nodes

tools.name: get_td_nodes
tools.description: List nodes in TouchDesigner with filtering options

tools.name: update_td_node_parameters
tools.description: Update parameter values for TouchDesigner nodes

tools.name: search_td_assets
tools.description: Search the catalogue of reusable TouchDesigner assets (offline, no TD connection needed)

tools.name: get_td_asset
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific TouchDesigner asset by ID (offline)

tools.name: deploy_td_asset
tools.description: Deploy a reusable .tox asset into the running TouchDesigner project

prompts.name: Search node
prompts.description: Find TouchDesigner nodes by various criteria
prompts.text: Search for TouchDesigner nodes using filters like name, family type, or parent path.

prompts.name: Check node errors
prompts.description: Analyze and diagnose TouchDesigner node errors
prompts.text: Analyze the current TouchDesigner project for node errors and provide debugging suggestions.

prompts.name: Node connection
prompts.description: Guide for connecting TouchDesigner nodes properly
prompts.text: Provide guidance on how to properly connect TouchDesigner nodes for optimal data flow.
